core_principles: Fusion of Gold & Pink: Balance warmth with metallic elegance
Negative Space: Use breathing room to create a sense of luxury
Content First: High-quality images of services are the main focus
Interactive Delights: Subtle gold shimmers and smooth transitions

primary.description: Muted Rose / Lotus Pink - Main brand color

background.description: Warm Porcelain/Ivory - Avoid pure white for softer look

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium transition-all duration-300 shadow-md hover:shadow-lg hover:scale-105
buttons.secondary: border-2 border-secondary text-secondary-foreground bg-transparent hover:bg-secondary hover:text-white rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium transition-all duration-300
buttons.gold: bg-secondary text-white hover:bg-secondary/90 rounded-none px-6 py-2 uppercase tracking-widest text-sm font-bold shadow-[0_4px_14px_0_rgba(212,175,55,0.39)]

cards.service: bg-white p-6 rounded-xl shadow-sm hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 border border-transparent hover:border-secondary/30 group
cards.glass: bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/20 shadow-lg rounded-2xl

inputs.default: border-input bg-transparent rounded-md focus:ring-2 focus:ring-secondary/50 focus:border-secondary transition-all

layout_strategies.admin_dashboard: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-6 p-6 bg-gray-50/50 min-h-screen

calendar.name: react-big-calendar
calendar.reason: Industry standard for custom calendar views, capable of Google Calendar-like scheduling

animation.name: framer-motion
animation.usage: Page transitions, scroll reveals, hover effects on service cards

admin_panel.style: Clean, high-density dashboard. Use white cards with subtle shadows. Sidebar should be dark (#2D2424) or gold-accented.
admin_panel.calendar_view: Must allow toggle between Daily/Weekly/Monthly. Use color-coded events for different services (e.g., Bridal=Gold, Hair=Pink).

booking_flow.style: Step-by-step wizard. Do not overwhelm the user. Show 'Summary' at the end before confirmation.
booking_flow.mobile: Sticky bottom bar for 'Book Now' on mobile if flow is long.

whatsapp_integration.style: Floating button, green brand color (WhatsApp official) but with a gold border to match theme.
whatsapp_integration.message: Hey, I am interested in your beauty parlour services. I would like to book an appointment.

universal_guidelines: Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters.
